'''Ril Garn''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] and held the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
As the commander of [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Unit 23/443]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Yetnis]], Lieutenant Garn attempted to cleanse that world of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives and the cells that controlled them in a campaign dubbed [[Operation: Rebel Hunt]].<ref name="HS" />

==Personality and traits==
Garn was fiercely dedicated to the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] and hoped to advance in the Army. He generally followed regulations, but would bend the rules if necessary. He hated the Rebel Alliance and wanted to wiped out every one he could find.<ref name="HS" />
